input.query: Where did urban deliveries move by pedal-assist cycle rather than a polluting van?
documents: The courier swapped a delivery truck for an e-cargo bike on downtown routes. Narrow lanes became faster, and bakery orders arrived without exhaust fumes.
The island school replaced its diesel generator with roof panels and a battery shed. Evening classes continued even when fuel boats were delayed.

The library van now parks outside the clinic every Tuesday. Patients can borrow large-print novels and return them at the pharmacy counter.
Tiny hive scales reported weight changes through a cellular modem. Beekeepers saw nectar flows without opening the boxes.
